heading: Exemption authority
label: 7231 Exemption authority
text: The Board may, on a case by case basis, exempt any person, issuer, public accounting firm, or transaction from the prohibition on the provision of services under , to the extent that such exemption is necessary or appropriate in the public interest and is consistent with the protection of investors, and subject to review by the Commission in the same manner as for rules of the Board under .section 78j–1(g) of this titlesection 7217 of this title
